features: Size: 26feet Length of Size D (3inch Unstretched Circumference).
Premium Materials: The tubular bandages are made from 100% cotton, providing more comfortable support without stretching or fraying.
Reusable: The elasticated bandage can be easily cleaned and reused, and the service life is long.
Safety: This support bandage is not sticky, and it will not pull the skin and hair when used. You just need to pull it gently to open it, which is conducive to the recovery of the wound.
Easy to use: You can cut the length and shape according to your needs. Let you achieve perfect fit and get more comfortable support.
description: Product description Features: : вњ”пёЏ It provides organizational support, scars, and thoracic treatment for strain and sprains, soft tissue injury, system edema, scars and thoracic trees, and many other wound dressing applications. : вњ”пёЏ Elastic net, good breathability, you can easily wear it under clothes. : вњ”пёЏ The stretch bandage roll is very suitable for ankles, wrists, elbows, and knees, and can also be used for pet wound wrapping. : : NOTE: : The bandage contains latex components, please do not use it for latex allergies. : : Package includes: : 1 x Bandages : : Directions Clean the wound, apply the bandage by gently pulling it to open, adjust the length and shape as needed, secure it in place, and monitor the wound for signs of infection.
